tool.name: EnzyWizard Energy
tool.description: Calculate molecular energy terms from a cleaned protein structure
tool.help:
**EnzyWizard-Energy**
Calculates molecular energy terms from a cleaned protein structure using OpenMM. Optionally performs energy minimization before evaluation.
**Inputs** - Cleaned protein structure in CIF or PDB format.
**Outputs** - JSON report with energy terms.
For more information, see the `enzywizard-energy` documentation: https://github.com/bioinfbrad/enzywizard-energy
